'''H'kig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galandan]] who served as a religious leader and the founder of a [[H'kig|religion named for him]]. Born on [[Galand]], he preached morals and goodness, and that people should live simpler lives. He was also very outspoken against the [[Ruling Families of Galand]], which put him to death after he insulted the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] of [[Galand]].
